---
title: "Sequential effects in judgements of attractiveness: The influences of face race and sex"
authors: "Kramer, R., Jones, A. L., & Sharma, D."
year: 2013
date: 2013-01-01
pub-journal: "PLOS ONE"
volume: "8(12)"
pages: "e82226"
doi: "10.1371/journal.pone.0082226"
pdf: "assets/papers/2013/kramer_etal_2013.pdf"
categories: [attractiveness, methodology]
---
